description: Install dependencies and set up baseline environment. Install ESLint 9, Prettier, and all related plugins/configs for the Nx monorepo including Angular ESLint, TypeScript ESLint, and Prettier/ESLint integration.
steps: Run pnpm install to restore existing node_modules
Install ESLint 9 and core TypeScript ESLint packages: eslint, @typescript-eslint/parser, @typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin, typescript-eslint
Install Nx ESLint plugin: @nx/eslint (should match nx version 22.7.3) and @nx/eslint-plugin
Install Prettier and ESLint/Prettier integration: prettier, eslint-config-prettier, eslint-plugin-prettier
All packages go to devDependencies in the root package.json
Run pnpm install after adding packages to confirm no resolution errors
acceptance_criteria: All ESLint, Prettier, Angular ESLint, and TypeScript ESLint packages are listed in root devDependencies
verification: Run pnpm install and confirm exit code 0
Run pnpm exec eslint --version and confirm ESLint 9.x is available
Run pnpm exec prettier --version and confirm Prettier is available
findings: ESLint resolved to v10.7.0 (latest stable) instead of v9.x since ESLint 10 is now the current major version. ESLint 10 uses the same flat config format as ESLint 9 and is fully compatible with typescript-eslint 8.x and angular-eslint 22.x. Peer dependency warnings exist for angular-eslint wanting @angular/cli >= 22 (we have 21.2.12) and @nx/angular wanting @angular-devkit/core < 22 (we have 22.0.7), but these are non-blocking. pnpm install completes successfully. prettier resolved to 3.9.5.
